trades.reasoning: LITE has hit the +12% profit target (bought at $871.16, now $977.48 = +12.2%) — locking in gains per the rules.
Score 95 with RSI 58 (least overbought among top candidates), MACD bullish crossover, and Universal Display benefits from rising OLED demand in risk-on tech environment.
Score 95 with RSI 67.5 in the sweet momentum zone, strong SaaS trend aligned with today's NASDAQ outperformance.
Score 95 with RSI 66.8 and clear MACD bullish crossover — Fastly's edge infrastructure plays well in a broad tech risk-on day.

decisions.briefing: Markets are firmly risk-on today with NASDAQ up 1.2%, giving a green light to deploy idle cash into top-scoring momentum names. LITE crossed the +12% profit target so we're locking in that gain and rotating the proceeds into three score-95 candidates — OLED, MNDY, and FSLY — all in the healthy RSI 55–70 zone rather than the overbought crowd. This brings us to 7 positions and meaningfully reduces our cash drag.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities rallied broadly on May 1, with the NASDAQ leading at +1.2% as investors rotated back into growth and technology names following a period of tariff-driven volatility. Risk appetite improved as markets digested signs of easing trade tensions and resilient corporate earnings, with mega-cap tech and semiconductor names among the session's biggest contributors. The S&P 500 gained +0.7%, reflecting broad participation beyond just the tech sector.
market_education.summary_zh: 美國股市於5月1日全面上漲，那斯達克指數領漲1.2%，投資者在經歷一段關稅驅動的波動後重新佈局成長股與科技股。市場風險偏好回升，部分原因在於貿易緊張局勢出現緩和跡象，加上企業財報普遍優於預期，大型科技股與半導體類股成為當日主要領漲力量。標普500指數上漲0.7%，顯示漲勢並非僅局限於科技板塊，整體市場參與度廣泛。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: A profit target is a pre-set price level at which you plan to sell a winning position and lock in your gains. This portfolio uses a +12% rule: once a stock rises 12% above your purchase price, you sell — preventing greed from turning a winner into a loser if the stock reverses. LITE hit exactly this threshold today at +12.2%, triggering a disciplined exit.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 止盈目標是指投資者預先設定的獲利賣出價位，用於在達到目標收益時鎖定利潤。本投資組合採用+12%的止盈規則：一旦股票較買入成本上漲12%，即執行賣出，防止因貪婪而坐視獲利回吐。LITE今日正好觸發此門檻（+12.2%），依紀律執行出場，是穩健風險管理的典型示範。
